headline: Assessing CDW (CDW) Valuation After Q1 Beat And Improving Macro Tailwinds
summary: CDW (CDW) increased its share repurchase authorization by US$1b on May 13, 2026, bringing the total program to US$7.5b. This move immediately put the stock back on investors' radar. See our latest analysis for CDW. Despite the buyback news and recent macro tailwinds, CDW's share price is still under pressure, with a 30 day share price return down 18.11% and a 1 year total shareholder return down 39.18%. This suggests that recent momentum remains weak. If you are looking beyond CDW for other...
